```log

2026-01-13 13:19:06.177 [info] Download failed: Download failed: Failed to copy server from local client. Downloading server locally and copying it over...
2026-01-13 13:19:06.177 [info] Downloading server from https://downloads.cursor.com/production/56f0a83df8e9eb48585fcc4858a9440db4cc7771/linux/x64/cursor-reh-linux-x64.tar.gz to C:\Users\lenovo\AppData\Local\Temp\cursor-server-7045042b-bc48-4ad7-b767-2501be1419ee.tar.gz
2026-01-13 13:20:07.336 [info] Downloaded server locally to C:\Users\lenovo\AppData\Local\Temp\cursor-server-7045042b-bc48-4ad7-b767-2501be1419ee.tar.gz. Copying to remote host at ~/.cursor-server/cursor-server-a6423141-3e14-469f-8c83-611d615148e2.tar.gz
2026-01-13 13:20:07.521 [info] Base64-encoding local file C:\Users\lenovo\AppData\Local\Temp\cursor-server-7045042b-bc48-4ad7-b767-2501be1419ee.tar.gz to temp file C:\Users\lenovo\AppData\Local\Temp\cursor_remote_copy_229feb7c-b4c7-4f1e-9552-dcc28d393e3b.b64
2026-01-13 13:20:12.355 [info] Copying file to remote via SSH: Get-Content -Raw "C:\Users\lenovo\AppData\Local\Temp\cursor_remote_copy_229feb7c-b4c7-4f1e-9552-dcc28d393e3b.b64" | ssh -T PJ-H-videodata "bash -c `'cat | (tr -d `"[:space:]`" || true) | (base64 -d 2>/dev/null || base64 -D || true) > `"`$HOME/.cursor-server/cursor-server-a6423141-3e14-469f-8c83-611d615148e2.tar.gz`"`'"
2026-01-13 13:20:14.054 [info] [copyToRemote][stderr]: client_global_hostkeys_prove_confirm: server gave bad signature for RSA key 0: incorrect signature
```

This error indicates an SSH key verification issue. The server's RSA signature doesn't match what's expected. Here are solutions to fix it:

## Quick Fixes

### 1. **Remove the problematic host key** (Recommended)
```bash
ssh-keygen -R PJ-H-videodata
```
Or if using an IP address:
```bash
ssh-keygen -R <ip-address>
```

Then reconnect - it will prompt you to accept the new key.

### 2. **Clear all known hosts** (if above doesn't work)
```bash
# Windows (PowerShell)
Remove-Item ~\.ssh\known_hosts

# Linux/Mac
rm ~/.ssh/known_hosts
```

### 3. **Update SSH config** (Temporary workaround)
Add to `~/.ssh/config`:
```
Host PJ-H-videodata
    StrictHostKeyChecking no
    UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null
```

⚠️ **Warning**: This disables security checks - only use temporarily.

## Root Causes

This typically happens when:
- The remote server was reinstalled/regenerated keys
- Network device is performing man-in-the-middle inspection
- The host key was changed for security reasons
- SSH key format incompatibility between client/server

## Best Solution

1. Remove the old key:
   ```bash
   ssh-keygen -R PJ-H-videodata
   ```

2. Test SSH connection manually:
   ```bash
   ssh PJ-H-videodata
   ```

3. Accept the new fingerprint when prompted

4. Retry the Cursor connection

If the issue persists, check with your server administrator whether the host keys were recently changed.

这个错误表明存在 SSH 密钥验证问题。服务器的 RSA 签名与预期不符。以下是解决方案：

## 快速修复

### 1. **删除有问题的主机密钥**（推荐）
```bash
ssh-keygen -R PJ-H-videodata
```
或者如果使用 IP 地址：
```bash
ssh-keygen -R <IP地址>
```

然后重新连接 - 它会提示你接受新密钥。

### 2. **清除所有已知主机**（如果上面方法无效）
```bash
# Windows (PowerShell)
Remove-Item ~\.ssh\known_hosts

# Linux/Mac
rm ~/.ssh/known_hosts
```

### 3. **更新 SSH 配置**（临时解决方法）
添加到 `~/.ssh/config`：
```
Host PJ-H-videodata
    StrictHostKeyChecking no
    UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null
```

⚠️ **警告**：这会禁用安全检查 - 仅临时使用。

## 根本原因

通常发生在以下情况：
- 远程服务器被重新安装/重新生成了密钥
- 网络设备正在执行中间人检查
- 出于安全原因更改了主机密钥
- 客户端/服务器之间的 SSH 密钥格式不兼容

## 最佳解决方案

1. 删除旧密钥：
   ```bash
   ssh-keygen -R PJ-H-videodata
   ```

2. 手动测试 SSH 连接：
   ```bash
   ssh PJ-H-videodata
   ```

3. 在提示时接受新指纹

4. 重试 Cursor 连接

如果问题仍然存在，请向服务器管理员确认主机密钥是否最近被更改过。
